turns.content: Strata-worker tests don't use Docker anymore — I switched to a mocked KV namespace so the suite runs in under 2 seconds instead of waiting on miniflare boot.
Nice — that should also unblock the CI matrix on the ARM runners where Docker layer caching was flaky.

query: Does the strata-worker test suite use Docker?
expected_answer: No — switched to a mocked KV namespace.
